zh.lifeSummary: 當Adeline de Ponthieu於1059年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利阿爾可-拉-巴塔爾時，她的父親Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu28歲，母親Adila d’Amiens29歲。她於1060年之前與William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1120年1月19日在英國薩默塞特福洛享年61歲。

zh-hans.Dunster Castle, Somersetshire, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特
zh-hans.Abbeville, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Franc: 法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆阿別維爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adeline de Ponthieu于1059年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利阿爾可-拉-巴塔爾时，她的父亲Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu28岁，母亲Adila d’Amiens29岁。她于1060年之前与William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1120年1月19日在英国薩默塞特福洛享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of Ponthieu, a habitational name from Ponthieu, a region (former county) in Picardy, between the rivers Authie and Somme.

nameMeanings.name: Adeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Adeline de Ponthieu was born in 1059, in Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu, was 28 and her mother, Adila d’Amiens, was 29. She married William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster before 1060. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 19 January 1120, in Frome, Somerset, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adeline de Ponthieu est née en 1059, à Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Adila d’Amiens, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster avant 1060. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 19 janvier 1120, à Frome, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adeline de Ponthieu 1059 in Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu 28 und ihre Mutter Adila d’Amiens 29. Sie hat vor 1060 William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 19. Januar 1120 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Frome, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adeline de Ponthieu è nata il nel 1059 nel Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Adila d’Amiens, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster prima del 1060. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 19 gennaio 1120, nel Frome, Somerset, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adeline de Ponthieuが1059年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアルクエス-ラ-バティイルで生まれた時，父Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieuは28歳，母Adila d’Amiensは29歳であった。1060年以前にWilliam de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1120年1月19日にイギリスソメルセトフロメで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adeline de Ponthieu(이)가 1059년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 아크스-라-바테이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adila d’Amiens(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1060년 이전 William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1120년 1월 19일 영국 서머세트 프롬에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Dunster Castle, Somersetshire, England: Dunster, Bro an Hañv, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adeline de Ponthieu nasceu em 1059, em Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Adila d’Amiens, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster antes 1060. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 19 de janeiro de 1120, em Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adeline de Ponthieu родилась в 1059 г. в местности аркуес-ла-батеилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Adila d’Amiens, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster перед 1060 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 19 января 1120 г. в местности фром, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adeline de Ponthieu nació en 1059, en Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Adila d’Amiens, tenía 29 años. Se casó con William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster antes de 1060. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 19 de enero de 1120, en Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
